description: Get dressed in this pair of slip-ons from catwalk for that fun look. The light metallic shades lends a dose of glamour to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Synthetic patterned uppers with mock suede overlays for added style and durability Stitch detailing for extra glam Elasticated asymmetric straps looped through metal loops for easy insertion and removal of the feet Lightly padded collar for greater comfort Midsole Perforations on the arch of the footbed for greater comfort Outsole Rubber outsole in a flexible design for greater flexibility of the feet Multi-directional grooves on the forefoot and heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
